calendar.matters:
Motion To Apportion Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Sep-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled the day for Motion to Apportion Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jeffrey Wehr, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Cory Christian, and for plaintiffs Karin Haywood, Connie Christian and Jon Camerlo, who were not present at today's hearing.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the heirs of decedent Louis Langren are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying survival, and wrongful death action, in the following proportions:

Karin Haywood - 65%
Cory Christian - 25%
Connie Christian - 5%
Jon Camerlo - 5%

Attorneys' Fees - $1,012.00.
Balance - $241,968.59.

Any future net settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall submit a proposed order to the Court no later than September 16, 2008.
